NOTICE OF APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRIMARK ERF INC A DELAWARE CORPORTAION DBA BIG TRA HEARING SET FOR JAN-22-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF TRIMARK ERF INC. A DELAWARE CORPORTAION DBA BIG TRA'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THE PROBABLE VALIDITY OF ITS CLAIM AGAINST SYNERGY HOSPITALITY GROUP AND THAT THE SUM IS A FIXED AND ASCERTAINABLE AMOUNT OF 26,900.23. (ZIELKE DECL., 4, EXHIBIT A.) THERE IS A DISCREPANCY IN THE EVIDENCE BETWEEN THE AMOUNT SOUGHT TO BE ATTACHED AND THE AMOUNT. (ID. 4, EXHIBITS A AND B.) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2015 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Jan-20-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Ryan L. Dahm, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, TRIMARK ERF, INC., a Delaware corporation, dba BIG TRAY.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) SYNERGY HOSPITALITY GROUP, a California corporation.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $26,900.23
Pre-Judgment Interest: $2,402.62
Attorney's Fees: $1,000.00
Costs: $730.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $31,032.85
Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jan-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. rULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TRIMARK ERF INC. A DELAWARE CORPORTAION DBA BIG TRA's Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is denied. Plaintiff has not established the probable validity of its claim against Synergy Hospitality Group and that the sum is a fixed and ascertainable amount of 26,900.23. (Zielke Decl., 4, Exhibit A.) There is a discrepancy in the evidence between the amount sought to be attached and the amount. (Id. 4, Exhibits A and B.) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
